subject: [RFC PATCH v2 4/9] mm: percpu: Split memcg charging and kmem accounting

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch splits memory group (memcg) charging and kernel memory (kmem) accounting into two separate steps to handle per-memcg-per-node kmem accounting. It introduces new functions `obj_cgroup_precharge` and `obj_cgroup_account_kmem` to decouple the page counter charge from KMEM stats, allowing for temporary overcharging of memcgs during allocation. The patch also updates existing functions in `mm/memcontrol.c` and `include/linux/memcontrol.h` to reflect this change.
